title: The Wooing of Etain
description: A woman is reborn three times across a thousand years, pursued by an immortal lover from the Otherworld.
introduction: A woman is reborn three times across a thousand years, pursued by an immortal lover from the Otherworld.

translation.original_text: Boí rí amra for Túathaib Dé Danann .i. Eochaid Ollathair.
translation.text: There was a wondrous king over the Tuatha De Danann, that is, Eochaid the Great Father.
